leadText: Acid Spray (Japanese: アシッドボム Acid Bomb) is a damage-dealing Poison-type move introduced in Generation V. It is TM013 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet and TM112 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Acid Spray inflicts damage and lowers the target's Special Defense by two stages. It has no effect on Pokémon with the Bulletproof ability. sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 The user spits fluid that works to melt the target. This harshly reduces the target's Sp. Def stat. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP The user spits fluid that works to melt the target. This harshly lowers the target's Sp. Def stat. LA The user spits fluid that works to melt the target. This may also lower the target’s defensive stats. S V The user attacks by spitting fluid that works to melt the target. This also harshly lowers the target's Sp. Def stat. ZA The user attacks by spitting caustic fluid at targets. This also lowers their Sp. Def stats for a while.
